question: A company tracks average website sign-ups per year. Which of the following statements is supported by the chart?

options.A: None of the listed statements about the latest full-year trend is supported by this chart.
options.B: The latest year clearly has the lowest sign-ups of all the years shown.
options.C: Sign-ups have sharply declined in the latest year compared with previous years.
options.D: The chart proves that sign-ups are now on a permanent downward trend.

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 4 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (519 sign-ups) directly to full-year values like 1,450 sign-ups creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
